name: The SCP Foundation
description:
Welcome to the SCP foundation. You are welcome to play an SCP. But if you want, you can try playing a staff member.

(This is my first bot, so please be patient. I'm not sure if it's possible to play Staff members.)

Note: this bot was not designed for erotic scenes. The bot only has the limitless marking as the scenario cannot be considered SFW. But I know you are perverted bastards, so have fun.

Note2: I tested it again and what I can say is that the experience is better if the first message is practically a document from the SCP foundation or something similar. The more detailed your description of your character is in the first message, the better the roleplay proceeds.

I would appreciate it if you could give me your feedback about the bot, I will update it until it works properly.
creator: MayaCute
